> 监测关键词：agent

## 关键词：agent

### GitHub (技术风向)
- **[yksanjo/dynamic-agent-assembler](https://github.com/yksanjo/dynamic-agent-assembler)** (★0, Python): Runtime Agent Team Construction with Vector-based Capability Matching
- **[amigoapp/amigo-ai-tools](https://github.com/amigoapp/amigo-ai-tools)** (★0, None): Create a super set of tools like agents, skills and others to be shared between all engineers.
- **[fahadNoufal/job-auto-apply-agent](https://github.com/fahadNoufal/job-auto-apply-agent)** (★0, None): An AI agent that can automate the entire job application process
- **[shirshmohan/smart-research-agent-app](https://github.com/shirshmohan/smart-research-agent-app)** (★0, None): LangGraph-based Smart Research Agent that chains tools for PDF summarization, web search, source ranking & citations, and document comparison—built with Python + FastAPI, with planned ChromaDB memory and React frontend.
- **[scottbushell/shopify-agentic-starter](https://github.com/scottbushell/shopify-agentic-starter)** (★0, TypeScript): None
